bio.lead: Full-stack developer focused on backend systems, building applications using Python, Django, and modern web technologies.
bullets: Building full-stack applications using Python, Django, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and SQL
Experience using Git and GitHub for version control and collaboration
Experience developing and working with scalable web applications focused on backend logic, APIs, and database systems
Understanding of databases, REST APIs, system design basics, and clean code practices

projects.title: ODM Comrades Chapter Platform
projects.description: Collaborated on the engineering and development of a centralized digital platform used for large-scale student registration across multiple universities. Contributed to system design and data management to support high-volume usage and streamlined organizational workflows.

projects.title: Traviona Consulting — Global Strategy, Insights & Talent Solutions
projects.description: Built a modern, professional platform for an international consulting firm specializing in business strategy, geopolitical intelligence, and global talent recruitment. Delivered a trustworthy digital presence with dynamic content, seamless user flows, and powerful tools for connecting organizations with top international professionals.

projects.title: Digital Leap Africa — Finance Lead (Partner Org.)
projects.description: Responsible for financial oversight and operational support within the organization, contributing to the sustainability and growth of digital initiatives across the region. Work closely with leadership to manage resources, support project execution, and ensure efficient allocation of funds.

experience.duties: Designing and developing web applications across the full stack, handling both frontend interfaces and backend systems. Building structured, maintainable applications with attention to performance, usability, and reliable data management.
